name: Assurant
description_short: Assurant provides insurance, warranties, and protection services for devices, homes, and vehicles through partnerships with major telecom, automotive, and property companies.
description_long:
Assurant is a global insurance and protection services company that operates behind-the-scenes with major brands to deliver comprehensive coverage and support. Founded on over five decades of data and expertise, the company manages protection programs for 325 million consumers worldwide, with specialized divisions covering mobile devices (64 million protected), vehicles and equipment (56 million), and mortgages (32 million). The company functions primarily as a B2B partner rather than a direct-to-consumer insurer, working with telecom providers, automotive dealerships, and property managers to distribute and manage their protection offerings.

Assurant's service portfolio spans device protection and repair, homeowners and renters insurance, auto coverage, appliance warranties, shipping protection, and flood insurance. Their capabilities include end-to-end claims management, mobile device repair through their own service network, product underwriting, and data analytics. They operate Device Care Centers with automation and robotics for device repairs and trade-in management. Customers access claims support and policy management through dedicated online portals organized by coverage type (mobile, renters, homeowners, auto, appliances, etc.).

The company distinguishes itself through vertical integration—combining underwriting, claims processing, repair services, and data analytics in-house rather than outsourcing. Their AI-driven solutions and automation infrastructure, plus five decades of accumulated risk data, enable them to offer scalable, data-informed solutions to enterprise partners. They emphasize service quality and brand protection for their partners, positioning themselves as enabling partners' core businesses rather than competing directly.

A critical caveat: Assurant is a wholesale/B2B insurance provider. Consumers do not purchase directly from Assurant; coverage comes through telecom plans, dealership warranties, rental agreements, or mortgage servicers. This means limited direct consumer choice and potential difficulty locating Assurant's own claims processes without knowing your product originated with them. Their consumer-facing value depends entirely on the partner through which you purchased.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Protects 325 million consumers globally with established infrastructure and five decades of data-driven underwriting
Integrated service network including Device Care Centers with automation and robotics for repairs and trade-ins
Comprehensive coverage options spanning devices, homes, vehicles, appliances, shipping, and flood insurance
Multiple dedicated claims portals and support channels organized by product type for easier navigation
Partner-first approach means solutions are customized and embedded into major telecom, automotive, and property platforms
Advanced data analytics and AI-driven claims processing to potentially accelerate resolution
Nationwide mobile device repair store network for convenient in-person service
cons: B2B-only model means consumers cannot buy directly; coverage availability and terms depend entirely on employer, service provider, or retailer partnerships
Limited direct consumer brand awareness—many customers may not realize Assurant manages their coverage, complicating self-service support
Fragmented claims processes across multiple portals (separate for mobile, renters, homeowners, auto, appliances) rather than unified account management
No transparent pricing or quotes available on their website for consumers to compare plans independently
Customer experience and claims handling quality depends on partner company, creating accountability gaps
best_for: Telecom customers purchasing mobile device protection through their carrier's plan
Auto buyers obtaining extended warranties and coverage through dealership financing
Renters and homeowners receiving insurance through property management companies or mortgage servicers
Businesses and enterprises seeking embedded protection solutions for customers
diagnosis: Assurant is best for consumers whose employers, service providers, or retailers have already partnered with them—meaning coverage arrives embedded in mobile plans, vehicle purchases, or rental agreements rather than through direct purchase. The main caveat is that you cannot independently obtain Assurant coverage; you access it only through existing third-party relationships, which limits transparency and consumer choice but ensures integration with trusted brands.
services: Mobile device insurance and protection plans with claims, repairs, and replacement
Cell phone repair services through nationwide repair store network
Homeowners insurance with quotes, policy management, and claims filing
Renters insurance with online policy purchase, payment, and claims management
Auto insurance and vehicle protection coverage
Data analytics and risk assessment for partners
Device trade-in and refurbishment services through Device Care Centers
Underwriting and pricing strategy services for partners
End-to-end claims support and management across all product lines
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
